questions.statement:
<p><strong>Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words.</strong></p>

<p>The art of effective or persuasive speaking or writing</p>

<p><strong>Directions: Select the correct antonym for the given word.</strong></p>

<p>Identical</p>

<p dir="ltr"><span style="  font-weight: 700; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Directions: Select the option that is nearest in meaning to the underlined word and mark your response accordingly.</span></p>

<p dir="ltr">The government imposed <strong><u>stringent</u></strong> measures to curb the spread of the pandemic.</p>

questions.statement:
<p><strong>In the following question, out of the given four alternatives, select the alternative which best expresses the meaning of the Idiom/Phrase.</strong></p>

<p>In the blues</p>
options: In a partnership usually for a dishonest reason /
In small amounts at a time /

questions.statement:
<p><span style="font-weight: 700;"><u>Directions</u>: Each item in this section consists of sentences with an underlined word followed by four words or a group of words. Select the option that is opposite in meaning to the underlined word and mark your response&nbsp;accordingly.</span></p>

<p>Peace and <u>tranquillity</u> are instruments that would boost the development of society.</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</p>

<p>Apprehension</p>

<p>Choose the word which can be substituted for the given phrase:</p>

<p>Change of appearance to deceive or to hide the identity.</p>

<p><span style="font-weight: 700; ">Directions&nbsp;</span><span style="">: Select the option that is nearest in meaning to the underlined word and mark your response on the Answer Sheet accordingly.</span></p>

<p><span style="">We are planning a <u>jaunt </u>for a while during the winter.</span></p>

<p><span style="  font-weight: 700; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Directions: Each item in this section consists of sentences with an underlined word followed by four words or group of words. Select the option that is opposite in meaning to the underlined word and mark your response on the answer sheet accordingly.</span></p>

<p>The editorial accused the government of <u>concealing</u> the truth.</p>
